items.title: S01E01 - Episode 1
items.summary: Polgar invites Sokolik to speak on his show, where he reveals a mysterious photo of an unidentified submerged object he believes to be extraterrestrial.

infolabels.title: Episode 1
infolabels.plot: Polgar invites Sokolik to speak on his show, where he reveals a mysterious photo of an unidentified submerged object he believes to be extraterrestrial.

items.title: S01E02 - Episode 2
items.summary: Julia struggles with Sara's sleepwalking terrors, and Polgar meets with Josef — a small-town farmer who claims he's seen foreign entities near his home.

infolabels.title: Episode 2
infolabels.plot: Julia struggles with Sara's sleepwalking terrors, and Polgar meets with Josef — a small-town farmer who claims he's seen foreign entities near his home.

items.title: S01E03 - Episode 3
items.summary: Wera travels to Truskasy to scoop the breaking story from under Polgar's nose with Sokolik's help. Julia and Polgar uncover a shocking new eyewitness.

infolabels.title: Episode 3
infolabels.plot: Wera travels to Truskasy to scoop the breaking story from under Polgar's nose with Sokolik's help. Julia and Polgar uncover a shocking new eyewitness.

items.title: S01E04 - Episode 4
items.summary: The state holds a conference to unveil Polgar's findings, but when Julia and Sara visit the lake, a hidden truth about Antek's disappearance resurfaces.

infolabels.title: Episode 4
